channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Observers react to Donald Trump’s appearance and stamina during G7 Summit in France
item.description: During the G7 Summit held in Évian-les-Bains, France, U.S. President Donald Trump’s appearance drew public attention and commentary regarding his health and stamina. The 80-year-old president traveled...

item.title: Online backlash follows JD Vance comments on U.S.–Iran nuclear inspection negotiations in Fox News interview
item.description: Vice President J.D. Vance sparked widespread online reactions after appearing on Fox News host Sean Hannity’s program to discuss ongoing negotiations between the Trump administration and Iran regardin...

item.title: A Collection of 30 Early 20th-Century Alcohol Advertising Posters Designed by Leonetto Cappiello
item.description: Vintage Everyday presents a curated collection of 30 advertising posters created by renowned Italian-born artist Leonetto Cappiello (1875–1942), one of the most influential figures in early twentieth-...

item.title: Exploring Pennsylvania’s Historic Wooden Roller Coasters
item.description: This article presents a journey through Pennsylvania’s rich heritage of wooden roller coasters, highlighting how the state played a central role in the development of early amusement park engineering....

item.title: White House Memo Reportedly Warned Against Proposal to Suspend Habeas Corpus During Deportation Efforts
item.description: A report discussed by former federal prosecutor Joyce Vance highlights internal disagreements within the Trump administration over a proposal to suspend habeas corpus as part of efforts to accelerate ...

item.title: Analyst says Trump’s decision-making on Iran war influenced by diplomatic flattery and ego framing
item.description: The article reports on analysis suggesting that President Donald Trump’s approach to ending the conflict with Iran was significantly shaped by flattery from Middle Eastern leaders and diplomatic frami...

item.title: Federal government reviews and suspends some citizenship certificates granted under expanded citizenship-by-descent rules
item.description: The federal government has suspended an unspecified number of Canadian citizenship certificates that were issued under recent changes to Canada's citizenship-by-descent legislation. Individuals affect...

item.title: Dispute Emerges Over Reported Economic Incentives in U.S.-Iran Memorandum of Understanding
item.description: A political controversy arose after President Donald Trump rejected media reports claiming that the United States would provide Iran with hundreds of billions of dollars as part of a recently announce...

item.title: Saudi Arabia face Uruguay in Group H clash at FIFA World Cup 2026 as live updates begin
item.description: The FIFA World Cup 2026 Group H match between Saudi Arabia and Uruguay got underway on June 15, 2026, with both teams looking to make an early statement in the group stage. Saudi Arabia entered the co...

item.title: Imran Khan undergoes fifth intravitreal eye injection at Pims as doctors report clinical improvement
item.description: Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf (PTI) founder and former prime minister Imran Khan was taken from Adiala Jail to the Pakistan Institute of Medical Sciences (Pims) for a scheduled eye treatment follow-up, whe...

item.title: Economist Warns Iran Agreement Reflects Urgency Over Rising Energy Costs and Fuel Supply Concerns
item.description: Economist Henrietta Treyz, director of economic policy at Veda Partners, argued during a CNN interview that the Trump administration's rapid effort to finalize a new agreement with Iran may reflect gr...

item.title: Former Trump Aide Questions White House Response to UFC Fighter's Remarks About Michelle Obama
item.description: A controversy emerged after MMA fighter Josh Hokit made a derogatory and false remark about former First Lady Michelle Obama during a post-fight interview at the UFC Freedom 250 event held at the Whit...

item.title: JD Vance criticizes Vatican diplomacy and reflects on faith in upcoming memoir
item.description: In a forthcoming memoir titled “Communion: Finding My Way Back to Faith,” U.S. Vice President JD Vance offers a critical account of a meeting with Vatican officials and reflects on his personal religi...

item.title: Report Says DOJ Approved Paramount-Skydance Acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery Despite Concerns From Career Antitrust Staff
item.description: A report cited by Raw Story states that the U.S. Department of Justice under President Donald Trump approved the proposed acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery by Paramount Skydance despite concerns r...

item.title: PMD forecasts rain, thunderstorms and windstorms across Pakistan from June 16 to 20, with light rain expected in Karachi
item.description: The Pakistan Meteorological Department (PMD) has forecast widespread rain, thunderstorms and windstorms in many parts of the country between June 16 and June 20 due to a westerly weather system and mo...

item.title: Former Senator Criticizes Trump’s Iran Policy as Damaging to U.S. Credibility and Global Standing
item.description: The article covers criticism from former U.S. Senator Claire McCaskill regarding President Donald Trump’s handling of Iran-related policy and its broader foreign policy implications. Speaking during a...

item.title: Report Claims Trump Administration Approved Qatar-Iran Payment Arrangement to Restore Shipping Through the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: A report cited by Raw Story alleges that the Trump administration secretly approved a financial arrangement involving Qatar and Iran during efforts to restore maritime traffic through the Strait of Ho...

item.title: Trump Administration's DOJ Approves Paramount Skydance Acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery Amid Staff Disagreements
item.description: The Trump administration's Department of Justice approved Paramount Skydance's proposed $111 billion acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery, a major media merger that includes CNN. According to a Wall ...

item.title: Todd Blanche Declines to Comment on Reported DOJ Investigation of Gavin Newsom During Senate Meeting
item.description: Acting U.S. Attorney General Todd Blanche declined to answer questions on June 15, 2026, regarding whether the Department of Justice is investigating California Governor Gavin Newsom. The exchange occ...

item.title: Sarvam secures $234 million in Series B funding led by HCLTech to expand sovereign AI research and infrastructure
item.description: Sarvam, an Indian sovereign artificial intelligence company, has announced the first close of its Series B funding round, raising $234 million at a post-money valuation of $1.5 billion. The round was ...
